response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong software development skills and a diverse technical background, but lacks direct experience with C++ on Windows and fixed-income/capital-markets domain expertise, which are critical for this role. Their strengths in modern development practices and full-stack experience are valuable but not aligned with the core requirements.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience with modern languages and frameworks (TypeScript, Node.js, React).
Proven track record in building scalable systems and contributing to open-source projects (e.g., GISCollective).
Strong communication skills and experience in knowledge-sharing (workshops, talks).
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience, especially on Windows (core requirement for the role).
No explicit mention of SQL Server/Oracle or capital-markets/fixed-income domain expertise.
Most recent roles focus on TypeScript/JavaScript, with no direct alignment to investment banking or financial systems.
